creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jason Tubnor from comment #2)
Sorry, I've looked at it back when it was submitted and got questions, but never asked them. :-)  So here we go.

Could you comment on "REQUIRE: securelevel" part?  I don't see it in many other RC files in the ports tree.  Same for "KEYWORD: nojail shutdown" (the nojail one).

Then, WRT "parkverbot_file" -- the naming here looks confusing to me for a list of *devices*, we should probably come up with a better name.

Last, I find \${${name}_file} a bit cryptic to read and unnecessary, I'd like to get rid of it, i.e. simplify.
